summary: Completed comprehensive testing of authentication and user management migration from localStorage to Supabase PostgreSQL. All backend APIs and frontend UI functionality working correctly.

accessibility_issues.component: Dialog components (User Dialog, Delete Dialog, Welcome Tour)
accessibility_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - console warning shown

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns success with token and user object
POST /api/auth/login with member1/member123 returns success
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401 with proper error detail
POST /api/auth/login with non-existent user returns 401
GET /api/users returns list of users from Supabase DB (admin, member1)
POST /api/users creates a new user in DB with proper fields
POST /api/users with duplicate username returns 400 error
PUT /api/users/{id} updates user name/email/role
DELETE /api/users/{id} removes user from DB and returns 404 on re-fetch
DELETE /api/users with non-existent ID returns 404
Deleted user cannot login (returns 401)
Frontend login page loads with all form elements
Frontend login with admin/admin123 redirects to /upload page
Frontend login with wrong credentials shows error message
Frontend login with member1/member123 redirects to /upload page
User Management page loads and shows users from database (admin, member1)
Add User button opens Create New User dialog with all form fields
Add User dialog creates new user and shows success toast
New user appears in users table after creation
Edit user button opens Edit User dialog with pre-filled data
Edit dialog has username field disabled (cannot change username)
Edit user successfully updates user and shows success toast
Delete user button opens confirmation dialog with user name
Delete confirmation removes user from table and shows success toast
Admin cannot delete themselves (no delete button for current user row)
action_items: MINOR: Add aria-describedby or Description to Dialog components to fix accessibility warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper async/await usage, bcrypt password hashing, JWT token generation
User CRUD operations correctly update Supabase PostgreSQL database
Frontend properly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL environment variable
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: All test users created during testing were cleaned up. Seed users (admin, member1) remain in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication and user management now uses Supabase PostgreSQL with SQLAlchemy async. Backend at /api/auth/login for auth and /api/users for CRUD. JWT tokens stored in localStorage. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_users.py covers all auth and user CRUD scenarios. Two seed users exist: admin (Admin role) and member1 (AdCom Member role).
